chunks.title: David's Plea for Vindication
chunks.reason: The psalmist opens with a prayer asking God to judge his cause and keep him safe as He tests his heart.

chunks.title: Description of the Wicked Enemies
chunks.reason: The speaker describes the attitude and actions of his enemies, comparing them to a lion ready to tear.

chunks.title: Confidence in God's Presence
chunks.reason: The psalm concludes with a declaration of hope to behold God's face and be satisfied upon waking.
